kv.memory.workflow-rule-every-small-code: Workflow rule: every small code-generation or fix Bead must be followed by two code-review passes before it is considered done. Add this explicitly to acceptance criteria for new codegen/fix Beads.
kv.memory.zephyr-builds-ec2: Zephyr Linux-only builds/tests can use AWS EC2 when local macOS or heft are insufficient. Local AWS profile: AdministratorAccess-921772462201. Keep instances small/short-lived, tag temporary resources with project/task, and terminate them after use.
